suggested_invariant.title: Backend endpoint GET /work-items/trash must be claimed by ≥1 use-case
suggested_invariant.statement: Endpoint GET /work-items/trash appears in the api inventory but is not covered by any use-case in the coverage matrix. Author a use-case that claims this endpoint, or remove the endpoint if it is dead API.
suggested_invariant.rationale: Unmapped endpoints are API surfaces with no traceable specification. Closing the gap is a precondition to release promotion (INV-INVENTORY-001).
